meta.description: Extracts top-level dependencies from an SBOM and verifies SLSA provenance for each

predicate.selector: cel.bind(root, sboms[0].get_root_nodes()[0], sboms[0].get_node_list().get_node_descendants(root.id, 1).get_nodes().filter(n, n.id != root.id).map(n, {'name': n.name, 'uri': has(n.identifiers.PURL) ? n.identifiers.PURL : '', 'digest': n.hashes}))

meta.description: Verifies SLSA provenance for Apache Commons components, skipping components not in the known list
Passes when the component is not in the known components list

assessment.message: {{ .Subject.Name }} not in scope, skipping SLSA checks

error.guidance: Component {{ .Subject.Name }} is in the components list and must pass SLSA checks

meta.description: Ensures the artifact was built by the Apache Commons builder
Ensures the artifact was built using the Apache Commons build type
Ensures the artifact was built from the Apache Commons Lang repository
